title: Sable: Floaters
description: a simple add-on for sable that adds elements to help the ship stay afloat. THE MOD IS AT A VERY EARLY STAGE OF DEVELOPMENT.
body:
![Make your dreams float](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4fb849f3a8ebdcac3e84f3cc16422383b49f2ce0.png)

**If you have any questions or suggestions, please write to the Create Aeronautics discord topic**

[Discord](https://discord.com/channels/937435293294919690/1515103635225182288)

# What is Sable: Floaters?
**Sable: Floater is a simple add-on for sable that adds elements to help the ship stay afloat.**

**if you like the mod, don't forget to put a heart, it will let me know that my mod is needed**
# Easy for survival
Floaters are blocks that can be crafted **at the very beginning of the game**, ~~unlike levitite~~

![Ez](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4fa2972cc3fd2680b6281cc1fadc01bd2c262f76.png)
![It's floater!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8b5ade6d60615daa8f9593e37acdc2ab864dd38d.png)
# Floaters Properties
Floaters are a rather **fragile** unit, so it should not be placed outside the ship.

# Config
![cool config. woooow](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dbe4323fe744321973152106d8ccaeb2785d68f7_0.webp)

# Alpha version!
**MOD IS IN THE EARLY STAGES OF DEVELOPMENT. The mod works, but unexpected behavior is possible, so be careful when configuring floaters**
